overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle journey through a futuristic dystopian city during golden hour. The drive begins at a busy intersection with pedestrians crossing, navigates through neon-lit urban streets with commercial storefronts, and transitions onto an elevated highway passing massive satellite dishes and industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: pedestrians begin crossing the intersection from right to left
vehicle accelerates forward through the crosswalk
dark van passes through intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection then accelerating through as pedestrians cross

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street from right to left
dark van driving through the intersection perpendicular to ego

massive concrete highway overpass with support columns
tall traffic signal pole at intersection corner
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a sunlit urban intersection during golden hour. A green commercial building dominates the left side while an elevated concrete highway structure looms in the distance. Pedestrians cross the street as the vehicle waits, then accelerates through the crosswalk as a van passes through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and palm trees

events.description: sharp left turn onto narrower side street
entering area with dense commercial storefronts and illuminated signage
navigating past vehicles parked along the street curb

agents.ego_description: navigating a left turn and driving through commercial streets lined with shops and palm trees

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk past storefronts

entered.detail: shops with illuminated neon signs and graffiti-covered walls
tall palm trees lining both sides of the street
wooden power poles with overhead electrical wires
vehicles parked along the right street curb
building with prominent green neon 'C TEAM' signage
large vertical advertising billboard with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The vehicle makes a sharp left turn into a narrower commercial street lined with palm trees and neon-lit storefronts. The green commercial building recedes into the distance as the camera passes parked cars and pedestrians on the sidewalk. A building with bright green 'C TEAM' neon signage appears on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway on-ramp and merge area

events.description: exiting urban streets and entering highway on-ramp
accelerating to highway speed while merging with traffic
merging with moderate traffic flow on the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the elevated highway and merging with flowing traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: metal safety barriers along the elevated road edge
large parabolic satellite antennas on industrial buildings
large corrugated metal industrial building with loading bays

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from urban streets onto an elevated highway on-ramp, leaving the commercial district behind. Accelerating to highway speed, the scene opens up with guardrails on the left and large satellite dishes appearing on industrial buildings to the right. The vehicle merges with traffic as the sun creates a bright glare ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with massive satellite array and industrial zone

events.description: passing massive satellite dish array dominating the right side
overtaking a large truck in the left lane

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the elevated highway passing industrial satellite installations

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck driving in the left lane being overtaken

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and towers visible in the hazy golden distance

segments.scene_description: Cruising along the elevated highway, the vehicle passes enormous satellite dishes that dominate the right side of the frame. The industrial zone stretches alongside the road while the futuristic city skyline rises in the distant haze. The vehicle overtakes a large truck as it continues along the sun-drenched highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that begins at a bustling urban intersection and ascends onto a sun-drenched industrial highway. It begins at a sunlit crossing dominated by a green commercial building, accelerating through a crowd of pedestrians as it enters the flow of traffic. The camera then makes a sharp left turn into a narrower commercial street, where the open intersection gives way to a corridor of palm trees and bright neon signage, including a glowing C TEAM storefront. As the vehicle leaves the commercial district behind, the scene shifts onto an elevated highway on-ramp, with the urban density opening up to reveal guardrails and large satellite dishes on industrial buildings. Finally, the vehicle merges into highway traffic, overtaking a large truck while cruising past enormous satellite arrays toward a distant, hazy city skyline under a bright golden glare.
